eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Osage, MO; at 10:03 AM on JUL 5, 2026 Effective until 6:03 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: All citizens in the Chamois area, if you need a place to go, a cooling center has been set up at the Community Center.  If more is needed such as medical care or supplies or medical transportation, contact 911.  We can send the correct EMS resources to you.
